titleStmt.title: SII 9.190: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 190. (A.R. No. 406 of 1920.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR AN OLD WELL AT PEDDAHOTURU, GOOTY TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 38, Vijaya, Kārtika, śu. 9, Budhavāra probably corresponding to A.D. 1113 October 20 Monday, not Wednesday, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva, ruling from Manneyakeṟe and states that Komāra Tailapadēva was ruling over Sindavāḍi thousand. At the request of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Daḷavaparasa, Sēnabōva Bāchirāja, Kētapa Gāvuṇḍa, Chāvuṇḍayya and others, Tailapadēva is said to have made a gift of land, on account of a lunar eclipse, for a charity water-lift(?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti . samastabuvanāsraA śrī
prithvīvallabhaṁ rājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭarakha satyāsreyakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābaraṇa śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaru
manneyakeṟeya nelevīḍinoḷu . sukasaṁkatāvi
nōdadi rājyaṁgeyuttalu śrīcāḷukyavikramavarū
śada 38 neya vijeAsaṅvaccarada srāheyalru�śima
tu komāraṁ tailapadēvargge sindavāḍi sāyiramaṁ kāruṇya
ṁgeydu koḍaluyavaru tuṁbuḷa nelavīḍinalu saṁka
tāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttaviralu cindavāḍi 86
baḷiya gaḍiya pōtūralu śrīmanu mahāma
ṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ daḷavaparasara sēnabōva bācirājanu
daḷaparājanuṁ māḍisi dharmētakke nāḍa manne yaru
savudaregaḷū Iyūra muliga cōḷagāvuṇḍara bamma
ṇnana maga kētapagāvuṇḍanu tipurāntakadaṇḍanāya
kara suputra cāvuṁḍamayyapramukhakaraṇaṁgaḷu bi
nnapaṁgeyyalu komara tailapadēvaṁ I dharmmētake Ā
kārttika sudda navami budhavarādandu sōmagraha
ṇanimityavāgi dharmmētakke biṭṭa datti mattaru 5
mūṟu sivastānakaṁ mattaru 12 Intī dharmmavaṁ
pratipāḷisidavaru sukaṁ rājyagevaru sukavirppa
ru I dharmmake vakravādavaru narakaprāptarapparu
nāḍa baṇaja dharmmētakke biṭṭa datti kaccavaḍadalu Aḍa
ke 5 hēṟinalu Ele 50 © svadattaṅvā paradattaṅvā
Ē harētu vasundara . saṣṭivariśasahasrāṇi yiṣṭanna
jāyatē krimi . Intī dharmmavaṁ keḍisidavaru vāṇarā
siyalu kavileA(ṁ)naḷida dōśa śrī .
sakarāsipaLines 28 and 29 are written on
ṇḍita pa(ha)ḍada datti .
Digital edition of SII 9.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
